name: Orora Limited
analysis: ORA's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 42% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$1.3720, stop A$1.3019, target A$1.5250 (2.18:1) — then trail it.
